summary: WIN-010 P1/P2 internal contradiction addressed via targeted one-sentence patch in detail_verdict_text (and parallel tightening of finding field). Old P1 sentence 'dome has no equation linking eclipses to magnetic perturbations' replaced with 'no first-principles equation that derives the eclipse magnitude from its own parameters — its published formula takes the magnitude as an input from the 2017 observation it is trying to predict.' Finding field now concedes the dome scaling equation and FSF = H(r)/r ratio derivation (Pearson r ≈ 0.9999) and keeps the critique on absolute-magnitude observation-anchoring. Both anchors verified unique. Bundled with ISS-1421 in the same EXP because both patches touch WIN-010 detail_verdict_text.
